data.content: The issue is classic: the file is generated during build execution, but **MSBuild globs expand at evaluation time** (before targets run), so the generated file is never added to the `Compile` item group. The fix is to explicitly include it.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Explicitly add to Compile since globs expand at evaluation time, before this file exists -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
      <FileWrites Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.reasoningText:
The issue is clear. The `GenerateSampleCode` target runs `BeforeTargets="CoreCompile;BeforeCompile"` and generates the file, but it never adds the generated file to the `Compile` item group. 

MSBuild globs for `Compile` items are evaluated at evaluation time (before any targets run), so the file generated during target execution isn't automatically picked up. The target needs to explicitly add the generated file to the `<Compile>` item group, and also to `<FileWrites>` so it gets cleaned properly.

Let me fix this.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Explicitly add to Compile since globs expand at evaluation time, before this file exists -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
      <FileWrites Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

  </Target>", "new_str": "    <Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Explicitly add to Compile since globs expand at evaluation time, before this file exists -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
      <FileWrites Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>"}

    <ItemGroup>

    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.content:
Build succeeds now. Here's the diagnosis:

**Problem:** The `GenerateSampleCode` target writes `GeneratedInfo.cs` during execution, but MSBuild's implicit `Compile` globs expand at **evaluation time** — before any targets run. So the file exists on disk but isn't included in compilation.

**Fix:** Added an `<ItemGroup>` inside the target to explicitly add the generated file to:
- `Compile` — so the compiler sees it
- `FileWrites` — so `dotnet clean` removes it
